scope.summary: Correct the base-inheritance ceiling documentation without changing inheritance behavior, and prove a child may explicitly raise max_level above its base.
out_of_scope: Changing profile inheritance or protected-profile semantics.

entry_points.name: profile base inheritance
entry_points.trace: child_can_raise_max_level_above_base resolves a READ_ONLY base plus a DDL child and asserts the effective child ceiling is DDL. README and configuration docs state that base is field reuse, not a fleet ceiling, and show protected=true as the immutable READ_ONLY control.

limitations: Scoped check only: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-config child_can_raise_max_level_above_base -- --nocapture (1 passed), plus rustfmt --check on crates/oraclemcp-config/src/profile.rs and git diff --check. The full workspace gate was not run for this close.
